entries.definition:
خَبَال khabāl [n./v. n.] 1 corruption, ruination (3:118) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ
آمَنُوا لَا تَتَّخِذُوا بِطَانَةً مِّن دُونِكُمْ لَا يَأْلُونَكُمْ خَبَالًا مَّا عَنِتُّمْ you who believe,
do not take for your intimates such outsiders [of your group] as
spare no effort to bring you ruin; they love what causes you
distress 2 trouble, confusion (9:47) لَوْ خَرَجُوا فِيكُم مَّا زَادُوكُمْ إِلَّا خَبَالًا
وَلَأَوْضَعُوا خِلَالَكُمْ يَبْغُونَكُمُ الْفِتْنَةَ had they gone forth with you, they would
only have given you trouble, scurrying around in your midst,
trying to sow discord among you.
entries.definition_english:
خَبَال khabāl [n./v. n.] 1 corruption, ruination (3:118) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ
آمَنُوا لَا تَتَّخِذُوا بِطَانَةً مِّن دُونِكُمْ لَا يَأْلُونَكُمْ خَبَالًا مَّا عَنِتُّمْ you who believe,

distress 2 trouble, confusion (9:47) لَوْ خَرَجُوا فِيكُم مَّا زَادُوكُمْ إِلَّا خَبَالًا
وَلَأَوْضَعُوا خِلَالَكُمْ يَبْغُونَكُمُ الْفِتْنَةَ had they gone forth with you, they would
only have given you trouble, scurrying around in your midst,
trying to sow discord among you.

entries.definition:
kh–b–w (there is a degree of overlap between this root and
root خ/ب/ʾ kh–b–ʾ) a small bedouin woollen tent, a house; the
encasing of grains inside the ear of corn; (of fire) to abate, to die
out, to become extinct. Of this root, خَبَت khabat occurs once in the
Qur’an.

خَبَا khabā u [v. intrans.] to become extinct, to abate (17:97)
جَهَنَّمُ مَأْوَاهُمْ كُلَّمَا خَبَتْ زِدْنَاهُمْ سَعِيرًا Hell is their Home, whenever it
abates, We increase the blaze for them.

خَبَا khabā u [v. intrans.] to become extinct, to abate (17:97)
جَهَنَّمُ مَأْوَاهُمْ كُلَّمَا خَبَتْ زِدْنَاهُمْ سَعِيرًا Hell is their Home, whenever it
